mission.title: dify: Workflow Schedule Feature
mission.description: Workflow Schedule Feature. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current dify deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dify version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
helm list -n dify 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dify installation.

steps.title: Review dify configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dify configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify
```
### Self Checks

- [X] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/langgenius/dify/issues), including closed ones.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Workflow Schedule Feature
steps.description:
Hi, . I'm [Dosu](https://dosu.dev), and I'm helping the Dify team manage their backlog. I'm marking this issue as stale.

**Issue Summary**
- You requested a workflow scheduling feature similar to "cron" jobs to automate tasks within the application.
- The feature aims to enhance usability by removing the need for external tools like n8n.
-  suggested using "dify-schedule" as a potential solution.
- You inquired about the feature's inclusion in the roadmap, but the issue remains

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Upgrade dify to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade dify:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade dify dify/dify --namespace dify
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify
helm list -n dify
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify
kubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Workflow Schedule Feature" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi, . I'm [Dosu](https://dosu.dev), and I'm helping the Dify team manage their backlog. I'm marking this issue as stale.

**Issue Summary**
- You requested a workflow scheduling feature similar to "cron" jobs to automate tasks within the application.
- The feature aims to enhance usability by removing the need for external tools like n8n.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dify installed or the issue environment reproducible.
